title: thlaspi montanum subsp. torreanum
intro: Thlaspi montanum subsp. torreanum, also known as the alpine penny-cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antibacterial agent, helping to combat infections and promote wound healing. The alpine penny-cress is also used to support respiratory health, with its expectorant properties helping to relieve congestion and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
